finding_results.notes: Cora no longer falls into a two-beat acknowledgment loop. She identifies why Thea left Lincoln open and sets a daylight-and-Monday condition that changes the terms of staying.
finding_results.summary: The post-climax exchange keeps negotiating leverage instead of flattening into repeated 'I know' replies.
